test_failure: What do these test failures mean?
Is this a real problem or just a minor issue?
build_error: Can I still use the app while this is broken?
file_created: How does this file connect to the rest?
Is this file important or just temporary?
git_commit: Can these changes be undone later?
long_silence: Is something still running or is it stuck?
Should I be worried about this silence?
git_push: Who will see these changes now?
Can this be reversed if something is wrong?
What happens on the shared server after a push?
git_diff: What parts of the code were changed?
Are these changes big or small?
npm_install: What helper code was just downloaded?
Why does the project need this new tool?
Could this change anything about how the app works?
file_deleted: Is it safe that files were deleted?
Why would they delete these files?
command_unknown: What is the main session working on right now?
Why did that last command run?
